nasb.text: Abraham said, “God will provide for Himself the lamb for the burnt offering, my son.” So the two of them walked on together.

esv.text: Abraham said, “God will provide for himself the lamb for a burnt offering, my son.” So they went both of them together.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕回答：“我兒，　神自己必親自預備獻燔祭用的羊羔。”於是二人繼續一起前行。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕说：“孩子，上帝自己会预备献燔祭的羊羔。”二人就继续向前走。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕说：“我儿啊，神必亲自预备燔祭用的羔羊！”他们两人就一同前行。
